assets.prompt_brief: Use STYLE_GUIDE.md and THEME_ALIGNMENT.md. character.light_warrior is a brave human champion channeling luminous guardian power, with white-gold/dawn-blue heroic readability.
Use STYLE_GUIDE.md and THEME_ALIGNMENT.md. enemy.shadow_imp is embodied dark influence: angular violet-black body, bright readable attack tell, dissolves into reclaimed light on defeat.

Use STYLE_GUIDE.md and THEME_ALIGNMENT.md. enemy.berserker is dark influence as containment/retaliation: heavy angular silhouette, visible charge tell, violet-black corruption with limited red damage edge.
Use STYLE_GUIDE.md and THEME_ALIGNMENT.md. vfx.sacred_circle is the covenant field and reclaimed territory: white-gold ring, dawn-blue inner safety, visible radial expansion when bravery succeeds.
Use STYLE_GUIDE.md and THEME_ALIGNMENT.md. weapon.thunder_hammer is luminous guardian power made physical: sacred gold, pale stone or electrum details, readable shockwave silhouette.
Use STYLE_GUIDE.md and THEME_ALIGNMENT.md. environment.arena is sacred territory under dark influence: circular sanctuary, violet corruption outside, pale stone/gold restored seams.

UE5 FBX blockout candidate generated through video-engine. Theme role: sacred technology node outside safety, borrowing Egyptian resonance temple architecture and restored-node lighting from Tartaria support. Still needs UE5 import, scale review, UVs, materials, and Play-In-Editor evidence.
Use STYLE_GUIDE.md and THEME_ALIGNMENT.md. audio.first_loop should combine heroic percussion/choir, warm luminous pads, temple chimes, and dark pressure layers.

Use STYLE_GUIDE.md and THEME_ALIGNMENT.md. audio.core_sfx should make bravery and restoration audible: dash shimmer, light strike, dark dissolve, circle expansion pulse, temple activation, hammer slam.
